Sage is a calm companion for growing your awareness, one free-form check-in gently routed across six areas of your life.
There's no form, no menu to navigate. You simply tell Sage what happened in your day, in your own words.
The moment you send it, your entry settles in instantly, while Sage listens quietly in the background and makes sense of it.
From a single sentence, Sage separates your reflections, rhythms, resources, rest, reactions, and replenishment, no categorizing required.
And if something doesn't land quite right, Sage never loses your words, a gentle retry is always one tap away.
Step away and come back, everything you've shared is still waiting for you, exactly as you left it.
Once a week, Sage looks back across everything you've shared and synthesizes it into one top insight, something to celebrate, and one gentle growth area.
Alongside that, focused patterns arrive on their own, a note on your sleep, a possible link between a symptom and a habit, where your spending drifted, how your time actually went.

Over time, Sage begins to notice its own patterns, how your sleep shapes your mood, where your spending drifts, what your body is trying to tell you, turning daily check-ins into lasting self-awareness.
